TABLE.NAME: confscheduler
TABLE.COMMENT: Main table for Conference Scheduler activity instances

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity description shown on course page

FIELD.NAME: confprogramcmid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course-module id of the mod_confprogram instance this scheduler pulls accepted submissions from

FIELD.NAME: gapminutes
FIELD.COMMENT: GapSnap: minimum gap, in minutes, enforced between presentations in the same room while dragging

TABLE.NAME: confscheduler_room
TABLE.COMMENT: A schedulable room/column within a confscheduler instance

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: Left-to-right column order in the grid

FIELD.NAME: colour
FIELD.COMMENT: Hex colour (e.g. #3366cc) used to theme this room's column; null means no theme/default styling

TABLE.NAME: confscheduler_slot
TABLE.COMMENT: A scheduled block: either a specific presentation, or a column-spanning block (e.g. plenary/lunch) with no presentation

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: it is a cross-plugin reference into another activity's table. Null for a column-spanning block with no presentation

FIELD.NAME: label
FIELD.COMMENT: Used only when submissionid is null, e.g. Lunch Break

TABLE.NAME: confscheduler_slotroom
TABLE.COMMENT: Junction table: the room(s) a slot occupies. A normal single-room presentation has exactly one row; a column-spanning block has one row per room it spans

TABLE.NAME: confscheduler_sessiontag
TABLE.COMMENT: Organiser-assigned 'session' grouping label for a submission, scoped to a single confscheduler instance. This is a plugin-local grouping concept: no 'session' concept exists in the shipped mod_confsubmissions/mod_confprogram schema (only 'track' does), and this table exists specifically so the Phase 3.4 autoscheduler's same-session priority does not require modifying those already-shipped, security-reviewed sibling plugins. Two submissions sharing the same non-empty label within the same confscheduler instance are 'the same session' for autoscheduler purposes.

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: it is a cross-plugin reference into another activity's table, same pattern as confscheduler_slot.submissionid

FIELD.NAME: label
FIELD.COMMENT: The organiser-assigned session label. Rows are only ever stored for a non-empty label; clearing a submission's tag deletes its row rather than storing an empty string

INDEX.NAME: confschedulersubmission
INDEX.COMMENT: At most one session-tag label per submission per confscheduler instance
